_comment: ESP32 Node Role Definitions — Complete role registry for the VesselNode firmware framework

roles.name: autopilot
roles.description: PID heading control with hydraulic rudder drive. Primary safety-critical node. Holds heading, tracks GPS course, and manages rudder solenoids (PORT/STBD/CLUTCH). Dual-ESP32 redundancy required.

required_sensors.name: bno085_compass
required_sensors.description: 9-DOF IMU for heading and rate of turn

required_actuators.name: buzzer
required_actuators.description: Piezo alarm buzzer via NPN driver

standalone_behavior.description: Autopilot continues heading hold using onboard compass and buttons. PID loop runs independently. OLED displays heading, mode, and rudder angle. No Jetson needed for core steering function.

calibration_steps.name: vessel_config
calibration_steps.description: Set vessel type, length, displacement, propulsion

calibration_steps.name: compass_calibration
calibration_steps.description: Swing ship 360° for hard/soft iron correction

calibration_steps.name: rudder_center
calibration_steps.description: Capture rudder amidships reference

calibration_steps.name: rudder_limits
calibration_steps.description: Capture port and starboard mechanical stops

calibration_steps.name: yaw_damping
calibration_steps.description: Tune D gain to eliminate yaw oscillation

calibration_steps.name: response_speed
calibration_steps.description: Tune P gain for transient response

calibration_steps.name: circle_test
calibration_steps.description: Full 360° verification of compass linearity

calibration_steps.name: alarm_tests
calibration_steps.description: Kill switch, power cycle, off-course alarm

roles.name: lighting_controller
roles.description: Deck, cabin, and navigation lighting channel control. Manages multiple PWM dimmer channels and scene presets. Supports dusk-to-dawn automatic mode.

required_actuators.name: pwm_channels
required_actuators.description: Up to 8 PWM channels via MOSFET drivers for lighting control

standalone_behavior.description: Lighting continues with last-known settings. Auto-dimming uses ambient light sensor. Scene buttons work locally.
standalone_behavior.manual_controls: Optional physical buttons for scene selection

calibration_steps.name: channel_mapping
calibration_steps.description: Assign physical channels to logical names

calibration_steps.name: brightness_curve
calibration_steps.description: Calibrate PWM-to-perceived-brightness curve

calibration_steps.name: light_sensor_offset
calibration_steps.description: Zero ambient light sensor reading

roles.name: engine_monitor
roles.description: Engine room monitoring: RPM, oil pressure, coolant temperature, exhaust temperature, fuel flow, alternator voltage. Critical safety role with alarm capability. Dual-ESP32 redundancy required.

commands.description: Get all current engine sensor readings
Set alarm threshold for a parameter
Acknowledge and clear an active alarm

standalone_behavior.description: Engine monitoring continues autonomously. Alarms sound locally via buzzer. Critical thresholds (over-temp, low oil pressure) trigger regardless of Jetson connectivity.

calibration_steps.name: adc_scaling
calibration_steps.description: Calibrate ADC readings against known gauge values

calibration_steps.name: rpm_calibration
calibration_steps.description: Set RPM sensor pulses-per-revolution

calibration_steps.name: alarm_thresholds
calibration_steps.description: Set warning and critical thresholds per parameter

calibration_steps.name: temp_offset
calibration_steps.description: Calibrate temperature sensor offsets

roles.name: deck_equipment
roles.description: Deck equipment monitoring and control: winch tension, pot hauler status, crane position. Reads load cells and limit switches. Provides over-load protection alarms.

required_sensors.name: hx711_load_cell
required_sensors.description: Load cell amplifier for line tension (up to 4 channels)

required_sensors.name: limit_switches
required_sensors.description: Limit switches for equipment position limits

commands.description: Get all equipment status and readings

standalone_behavior.description: Load monitoring continues. Over-load alarms sound locally. Equipment status reported on OLED.
standalone_behavior.manual_controls: Equipment control buttons at deck station

calibration_steps.name: load_cell_tare
calibration_steps.description: Zero load cells with no load

calibration_steps.name: load_cell_calibration
calibration_steps.description: Apply known weight for scaling factor

calibration_steps.name: tension_alarm_set
calibration_steps.description: Set over-tension alarm thresholds

roles.name: camera_interface
roles.description: Camera power control, PTZ (pan-tilt-zoom) motor control, and video streaming trigger. Interfaces with Jetson-Bravo DeepStream pipeline for vision processing.

standalone_behavior.description: Camera maintains last PTZ position. No streaming without Jetson. PTZ can be controlled via physical joystick if connected.

calibration_steps.name: ptz_center
calibration_steps.description: Set PTZ home/center position

calibration_steps.name: ptz_limits
calibration_steps.description: Capture pan/tilt mechanical limits

calibration_steps.name: camera_focus
calibration_steps.description: Set autofocus trigger zones (if applicable)

roles.name: environmental_sensor
roles.description: Wind speed/direction, barometric pressure, air temperature, humidity, water temperature. Provides real-time weather data to the cluster and autopilot wind mode.

standalone_behavior.description: Environmental sensors continue sampling. Data available locally via OLED. Wind data available to autopilot via NMEA MWV sentences.

calibration_steps.name: baro_offset
calibration_steps.description: Set barometric pressure to local altimeter setting

calibration_steps.name: wind_direction_zero
calibration_steps.description: Align wind vane to bow reference

calibration_steps.name: wind_speed_factor
calibration_steps.description: Calibrate anemometer pulse-to-speed factor

roles.name: bilge_monitor
roles.description: Bilge water level monitoring, automatic pump control, and flood alarm. Critical safety function — prevents vessel sinking from undetected flooding.

required_sensors.name: bilge_level_floats
required_sensors.description: Bilge level float switches (low/medium/high) per compartment

required_sensors.name: bilge_level_analog
required_sensors.description: Continuous bilge level sensor (optional, resistive tape)

required_actuators.name: bilge_pump_relay
required_actuators.description: Bilge pump motor relay (12V, high current)

commands.description: Get current bilge levels for all compartments
Run pump test cycle (3 second run)

standalone_behavior.description: Bilge monitoring and pump control continue autonomously. Pump activates on high water regardless of Jetson. Flood alarm sounds locally and remotely.
standalone_behavior.manual_controls: Pump override toggle at each bilge access point

calibration_steps.name: float_switch_test
calibration_steps.description: Verify float switch operation per compartment

calibration_steps.name: pump_run_test
calibration_steps.description: Test pump activation and flow

calibration_steps.name: alarm_levels
calibration_steps.description: Set alarm thresholds per compartment

roles.name: navigation_aid
roles.description: Navigation light controller, AIS data relay, masthead light, anchor light, steaming light, all-round light. COLREGS-compliant light patterns with automatic dusk-to-dawn switching.

required_sensors.name: bh1750_light
required_sensors.description: Ambient light sensor for dusk-to-dawn switching

required_sensors.name: gps_puck
required_sensors.description: GPS receiver for anchor watch drift detection (optional)

standalone_behavior.description: Navigation lights switch automatically based on ambient light and vessel mode. Manual override via physical switch at helm. COLREGS compliance maintained without Jetson.
standalone_behavior.manual_controls: Physical nav light switch panel at helm station

calibration_steps.name: light_threshold
calibration_steps.description: Set ambient light threshold for auto-switching

calibration_steps.name: light_test
calibration_steps.description: Verify all navigation light circuits

calibration_steps.name: anchor_watch_radius
calibration_steps.description: Set anchor watch GPS drift radius

_comment_common_tasks: These tasks run on ALL VesselNode instances regardless of role

common_tasks.name: task_watchdog_heartbeat
common_tasks.description: Monitor all task heartbeats, kick external WDT, monitor voltage

common_tasks.name: task_serial_jetson_rx
common_tasks.description: Receive and parse commands from Jetson over RS-422

common_tasks.name: task_serial_jetson_tx
common_tasks.description: Transmit telemetry to Jetson over RS-422

common_tasks.name: task_protocol_dispatch
common_tasks.description: Parse JSON and dispatch to command handlers

_comment_common_commands: These commands are handled by the base framework for all roles
_comment_provisioning: Provisioning timeout for unprovisioned nodes waiting for Jetson response
